74352.subject: 🔒Microsoft banned Claude Fable
74352.body:
----------
######                      [Sign Up](http://utm.genai.works/r/gg2ubr5) | [Collaborate with us](https://6hhfxazcbpc.typeform.com/to/uXIl0IFH?utm_source=atlas&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=general_2026_05_11&utm_content=banner_post)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** Claude Fable 5 had been public for one day when Microsoft limited employee access while its lawyers read Anthropic's new data terms. The same Wednesday, Visa moved your card into ChatGPT, Mastercard launched a payment system for AI agents that spend fractions of a cent and Dario Amodei asked Washington for the power to block models like the one his company shipped Tuesday. 



**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Microsoft vs Fable:** What did Microsoft's lawyers find in the new Claude's terms?

* **Visa x ChatGPT:** What happens the first time ChatGPT buys the wrong thing with your card?

* **Anthropic's proposal:** Why would the most valuable private AI company ask to be regulated?

* **Mastercard's machine money:** What do AI agents buy with payments worth a fraction of a cent?


----------

----------
## [Microsoft won't clear the new Claude for its own staff](https://www.reuters.com/technology/microsoft-limits-employee-use-anthropics-claude-fable-5-over-data-retention-2026-06-10/)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e602b7ae-0fc4-49b5-9208-81b143fbb6dc/Beehiiv_01_-_Jun_11.png?t=1781170265)
Caption: 

Claude Fable 5 went live Tuesday. By Wednesday, Microsoft had moved to limit employee use of it while company lawyers decide whether to allow it at all.

The dispute is the fine print we covered yesterday. Anthropic keeps every prompt and output that touches a Mythos-class model for 30 days, on every platform where the model runs, business customers included. 

Anything its classifiers mark as a possible policy violation stays for up to two years.

Anthropic's reasoning is that jailbreaks operate across many requests, so catching them takes a stored window of evidence. It says the data never trains models and gets deleted on schedule in almost all cases. 

Microsoft's lawyers read the same policy and saw customer data and confidential information sitting on another company's servers for a month.

The review only covers the Mythos-class line, so Opus and Sonnet aren't part of it.

Fable is also included on paid Claude plans only through June 22, then moves to usage credits. That gives Anthropic eleven days to convince corporate legal teams the retention window is survivable, and the first verdict is Microsoft's.


----------



----------
_Special highlight from our network_

74347.subject: cenová ponuka
74347.body:
Dobrý deň Vám prajem, 

na základe nášho stretnutia Vám posielam spracovanú cenovú ponuku.

Cenová ponuka je orientačná a nezáväzná, čokoľvek sa môže zmeniť, upraviť, pridať, ubrať. Výsledná suma vždy závisí od konkrétnych predstáv a požiadavok klienta, od druhu a množstva použitých živých a všetkých ostatných materiálov. 

Štandardne pracujeme tak, že takto dopredu pred svadbou pripravujem ponuku, ktorá je orientačná. Ťažko dopredu určiť presnú sumu a takisto ani Vy nemusíte ešte teraz presne vedieť koľko príde nakoniec hostí, ako sa bude sedieť, koľko stolov budete potrebovať, ako sa môžu zmeniť Vaše predstavy. :-)
Zhruba dva týždne pred svadbou, ako som už spomínala, prípadne podľa potreby skôr sa pripraví predbežná kalkulácia, ktorá sa vyrátava už na základe reálnych počtov položiek a požiadavok a v neposlednom rade počtu hostí.
Všetko je to v prvom rade o komunikácii. Snažím sa jednať s ľuďmi fér, seriózne a k práci pristupovať zodpovedne.
Myslím, že sa dá na mňa v čomkoľvek obrátiť a spoľahnúť. 

Kľudne si ponuku preštudujte a ak by ste mali akékoľvek otázky, chceli sa na čokoľvek opýtať, ak by ste chceli niečo zmeniť, pridať, ubrať, prípadne nastaviť si výšku budgetu kľudne sa na mňa obráťte, rada Vám odpoviem, pomôžem, poradím. 
Všetko som pripravila tak, aby to bolo čo najjednoduchšie pochopiteľné. Ak by bolo čokoľvek nejasné, pýtajte sa.

Ak som na niečo zabudla kľudne ma doplňte. 😉

Budem čakať za Vašou spätnou väzbou.

Prajem krásny deň.



S pozdravom / Best regards

Bc. Lucia Ortutová
Event manager/wedding coordinator

+421 907 382 402
www.dekoracnyservis.sk
info@dekoracnyservis.sk

74337.subject: Mastercard Opens Its Rails to AI Agents
74337.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[Mastercard](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/mastercard-agent-pay-machines-ap4m-ai-agents-crypto-partners)**[ opens its card rails to AI agents, 31 partners](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/mastercard-agent-pay-machines-ap4m-ai-agents-crypto-partners)

* **[Ripple](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/ripple-xrpl-ai-starter-kit-mastercard-agent-pay-machines)**[ ships XRPL AI kit as Mastercard names it partner](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/ripple-xrpl-ai-starter-kit-mastercard-agent-pay-machines)

* **[DOJ](https://thedefiant.io/converge/regulation/doj-opens-debanking-probe-jpmorgan-bank-of-america-wells-fargo)**[ subpoenas JPMorgan, BofA, Wells Fargo over debanking](https://thedefiant.io/converge/regulation/doj-opens-debanking-probe-jpmorgan-bank-of-america-wells-fargo)

* **[Japan's megabanks](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/japan-megabanks-mufg-mizuho-and-smbc-establish-joint-stablecoin-council)**[ form yen stablecoin council, live by 2027](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/japan-megabanks-mufg-mizuho-and-smbc-establish-joint-stablecoin-council)

* **[Binance](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/binance-launches-bstocks-tokenized-us-equities-24-7-onchain-trading)**[ puts brokerage stocks on-chain with bStocks launch](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/binance-launches-bstocks-tokenized-us-equities-24-7-onchain-trading)

AI-meets-crypto stories today. **Mastercard** opened its card network to autonomous AI agents on Wednesday, launching **[Agent Pay for Machines](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/mastercard-agent-pay-machines-ap4m-ai-agents-crypto-partners)** with **31 partners**; Coinbase, RippleX, Solana Foundation, Polygon, Aave Labs, and Stellar among them, and stablecoin settlement built in from day one. Within the same news cycle, **Ripple** shipped the [XRPL AI Starter Kit](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/ripple-xrpl-ai-starter-kit-mastercard-agent-pay-machines), wiring XRP and RLUSD payments into the agent toolchains devs already use.

**Read more below!**

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9d5fb1f6-e233-4313-8e53-76981459f988/image.png)
Caption: 

Nexo is a digital wealth platform offering crypto yield up to 15% and crypto-backed credit lines from 1.9%. **[Join and get 30-day access to exclusive rates](https://nexo.com/defiant2)**. Terms apply.

———————————————————————————

##### WATCH

## DeFi's Near-Death Moment | Mike Silagadze on Ether.fi, Security, and What Comes Next

How close did DeFi come to a systemic collapse? **Camila Russo** sits down with **Mike Silagadze**, co-founder and CEO of Ether.fi, for the full post-mortem on the Kelp exploit and the DeFi United rescue — why the default path could
